caption: The video features an older woman with short, curly gray hair and glasses, sitting in what appears to be an office environment. She is wearing a red top and has a gold necklace and earrings. The background includes a filing cabinet and some office supplies on a shelf. The woman seems to be engaged in a conversation or interview, as she is speaking and her mouth is moving. The setting suggests a professional atmosphere, possibly related to work or administration. The lighting is bright, indicating that it might be daytime.
